apiKey.name: Abacus AI API Key
apiKey.hint: Your ChatLLM API key from Abacus AI. Keep this private — it will be sent with every request. World-scoped, GM-only.

modelName.name: AI Model
modelName.hint: Model identifier to use for generation. Defaults to gemini-3-flash-preview. Any model exposed by your Abacus AI deployment is acceptable.

apiEndpoint.name: API Endpoint
apiEndpoint.hint: Chat-completions endpoint URL. Defaults to https://routellm.abacus.ai/v1/chat/completions. Override only if you use a custom AI backend.

intensity.name: Skald Intensity
intensity.hint: How dramatic and verbose the Skald speaks (1 = terse, 10 = full saga-singer operatic).

autoNarrateCombat.name: Auto-Narrate Combat
autoNarrateCombat.hint: When enabled, the Skald posts a short flavour line at the start of each combatant's turn.

autoControlEnemies.name: AI Controls Enemies
autoControlEnemies.hint: When enabled, the Skald takes the turn for any non-player combatant: deciding action, moving the token, rolling the attack, applying harm, then advancing the turn.

memoryLength.name: Conversation Memory
memoryLength.hint: How many recent messages the Skald remembers per conversation channel.

ironswornIntegration.name: Ironsworn Rules Integration
ironswornIntegration.hint: When the foundry-ironsworn system is active, let the Skald read character state, trigger the system's own move rolls, and narrate the official outcomes. Disable to run the Skald purely as a narrator. No effect if the Ironsworn system is not installed.

suggestMoves.name: Suggest Moves
suggestMoves.hint: Allow the Skald to recommend an Ironsworn move after its narration, shown as an interactive card with a one-click 'Roll' button and a 'Choose Different Move' option. Requires Ironsworn Rules Integration.

autoNarrateMoves.name: Auto-Narrate Move Outcomes
autoNarrateMoves.hint: When a move is rolled through the Ironsworn system, the Skald automatically narrates the result (strong hit / weak hit / miss) in saga style. Requires Ironsworn Rules Integration.

narrationDelay.name: Narration Delay (ms)
narrationDelay.hint: How long to wait after a roll before auto-narrating (allows dice animations to finish). Recommended: 2000ms for Dice So Nice, 500ms without.

aiAppliesEffects.name: AI Applies Mechanical Effects
aiAppliesEffects.hint: Permit the Skald to apply mechanical effects it proposes — adjusting momentum, harm, stress, supply, marking progress, rolling oracles, and running the combat automation (combat tracks & initiative). On by default. Turn OFF to keep the player in full control of the sheet.

autoCreateCombatTracks.name: Auto-Create Combat Tracks
autoCreateCombatTracks.hint: When the Skald narrates the start of a fight, automatically create a combat progress track for each foe so attacks can be marked against it. Requires AI Applies Mechanical Effects.

defaultEnemyRank.name: Default Enemy Rank
defaultEnemyRank.hint: Fallback challenge rank for CUSTOM enemies only — used when the Skald invents a foe that is not in the Ironsworn foe compendium and does not specify a rank. Standard foes (Bear, Wyvern, Bandit, …) automatically use their official compendium rank. Higher ranks take more progress to fill (troublesome = quickest, epic = longest).

debugLogging.name: Debug Logging
debugLogging.hint: Print verbose Ironsworn integration diagnostics to the browser console (F12). Useful for troubleshooting move detection and effect parsing.

commands.oracle: Roll an Ironsworn oracle and have the Skald interpret it.
commands.lore: Generate world-building lore and create a Journal Entry.
commands.combat: Get tactical narration/advice for the current combat.

errors.noApiKey: No Abacus AI API key is set. Open Module Settings → The Eternal Skald and provide your key.
errors.emptySkald: Speak, Ironsworn. Usage: !skald <your question or prompt>
errors.emptyNpc: Name the one you would meet. Usage: !npc <name or description>
errors.emptyLore: What chronicle shall I write? Usage: !lore <topic>

ui.thinking: The Eternal Skald listens to the wind…
